item.title: NeurIPS 道歉：禁止中国机构投稿系「沟通误解」，已更新规则
item.guid: NeurIPS-道歉：禁止中国机构投稿系「沟通误解」，已更新规则
item.description:
Yesterday, the official NeurIPS academic conference issued a statement, formally apologizing for the controversy surrounding its submission rules, admitting that the root cause of the problem was "a communication misunderstanding between the NeurIPS Foundation and its legal team," and stating that it "never intended to restrict submissions beyond mandatory compliance obligations." 昨天，学术会议 NeurIPS 官方发布声明，正式就征稿规则风波道歉，承认问题根源在于「NeurIPS 基金会与法律团队之间的沟通误解」，并表示「从未打算在强制性合规义务之外限制投稿」。

NeurIPS simultaneously announced that it has updated its submission guidelines to align with the submission rules of ACM, IEEE, other international conferences, and previous NeurIPS events, reiterating that it "welcomes submissions from all institutions and individuals who meet compliance requirements." NeurIPS 同步宣布已更新投稿手册，与 ACM、IEEE 及其他国际会议和往届 NeurIPS 的投稿规则保持一致，重申「欢迎所有符合合规要求的机构和个人提交论文」。

The incident originated when NeurIPS, in this year's call for papers, prohibited institutions listed on relevant U.S. lists from submitting papers, participating in reviews, or serving as editors, citing "compliance with U.S. sanctions and trade control regulations." 事件起因于 NeurIPS 在今年征稿通知中，以「遵守美国制裁与贸易管制规定」为由，禁止被列入美国相关名单的机构投稿、参与评审及担任编辑。

The affected institutions include hundreds of Chinese organizations, including Huawei, numerous universities, research institutes, key laboratories, and the three major operators. Consequently, relevant researchers have been deprived of the right to present and publish their findings at this top conference. 受影响机构涵盖华为、多所高校院所及重点实验室、三大运营商在内的数百家中国机构，相关科研人员因此被剥夺在该顶会展示与发表成果的权利。

After the news broke, the China Computer Federation (CCF) was the first to issue a strong statement, advocating that all Chinese researchers in the computer field refuse to submit papers to NeurIPS and decline to provide any academic services such as reviewing, editing, or organizing for it. 消息传出后，中国计算机学会（CCF）率先强硬表态，倡议全体中国计算机领域科研工作者拒绝向 NeurIPS 投稿，并拒绝为其提供审稿、编辑、组织等任何学术服务。

Yesterday, the China Association for Science and Technology issued an official statement, announcing that it would stop accepting funding applications for scholars attending this year's NeurIPS conference, and would not recognize papers accepted by this NeurIPS as representative works for project applications. Related funding will be redirected to domestic academic conferences or other eligible international conferences. 昨天，中国科学技术协会发布官方声明，宣布停止受理学者参加今年 NeurIPS 会议的资助申请，不予认可以本届 NeurIPS 中稿论文作为代表作的项目申请，相关资助将转向国内学术会议或其他符合条件的国际会议。

item.title: 防止人才被挖，苹果向设计师发放高额奖金
item.guid: 防止人才被挖，苹果向设计师发放高额奖金
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Apple this week issued a rare batch of additional bonuses to iPhone hardware designers, primarily targeting the iPhone product design team, independent of Apple's regular quarterly and annual performance bonuses. 据彭博社报道，苹果本周向 iPhone 硬件设计师发放了一批罕见的额外奖金，发放对象主要集中于 iPhone 产品设计团队，与苹果常规的季度及年度绩效奖金相互独立。

The bonuses were issued in the form of Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) with a four-year vesting period, meaning employees must remain at Apple for four years to receive the full benefits. It is reported that individual bonuses are valued between approximately $200,000 and $400,000, with the final amount also fluctuating with Apple's stock performance. 此次奖金以限制性股票单位（RSU）形式发放，归属期为四年，意味着员工须在苹果任职满四年方可获得全部收益。据悉，单人奖金价值约在 20 万至 40 万美元之间，最终金额还将随苹果股价表现而浮动。

Bloomberg reporter Mark Gurman, citing informed sources, stated that employees generally view this pay raise as a direct response to the recent surge in large-scale hiring by startups. 彭博社记者 Mark Gurman 引援知情人士表示，员工普遍将这次薪酬提升视为对近期初创企业大规模招聘热潮的直接回应。

However, compared to the offers from competitors, these bonuses still appear modest. OpenAI offers annual stock incentives of up to $1 million to Apple engineers interested in switching jobs. 不过，相较于竞争对手开出的条件，此次奖金仍显逊色。OpenAI 向有意跳槽的苹果工程师提供的年度股票激励最高可达 100 万美元。

OpenAI's hardware division is co-led by former Apple executive Tang Tan. Tang Tan was long responsible for the iPhone product design team, which is precisely the core group that received these bonuses. OpenAI 的硬件部门由前苹果高管唐·坦（Tang Tan）联合主导。唐·坦曾长期负责 iPhone 产品设计团队，正是此次获发奖金的核心群体。

Reportedly, his team has poached dozens of engineers from Apple, covering multiple product lines including iPhone, iPad, Apple Watch, and Vision Pro. Additionally, OpenAI has collaborated with former Apple Chief Design Officer Jony Ive to jointly develop new generation AI hardware products, with plans for a launch next year. 据报道，其团队已从苹果挖走数十名工程师，涵盖 iPhone、iPad、Apple Watch 及 Vision Pro 等多条产品线。此外，OpenAI 还与前苹果首席设计官乔尼·艾维（Jony Ive）展开合作，共同开发新一代 AI 硬件产品，并计划于明年推出。

item.title: Gemini 推出记忆导入功能
item.guid: Gemini-推出记忆导入功能
item.description:
Yesterday, Gemini launched two new features, "Import Memories" and "Import Chat History," allowing users to directly migrate personal preferences and conversation history accumulated in other AI applications to Gemini, eliminating the need to re-"train" the assistant from scratch. 昨天，Gemini 推出「导入记忆」和「导入聊天记录」两项新功能，允许用户将在其他 AI 应用中积累的个人偏好与对话历史直接迁移至 Gemini，无需从零开始重新「训练」助手。

    Import Memories: After entering the Gemini settings page, the system will provide a prompt. Copy and paste it into your existing AI application. Once that application generates a preference summary, paste the content back into Gemini to "move" your memories to Gemini;

    Import Chat History: Export the complete chat history from your original AI assistant, upload it to Gemini as a .zip archive no larger than 5GB, and then you can continue previous conversations within Gemini.

item.title: Claude 新模型曝光，官方称「将带来前所未有的安全风险」
item.guid: Claude-新模型曝光，官方称「将带来前所未有的安全风险」
item.description:
According to Fortune, a new AI model being tested by Anthropic has been revealed, codenamed "Claude Mythos," which significantly outperforms the current strongest version, Claude Opus 4.6, in multiple tests including programming, academic reasoning, and cybersecurity. 据《财富》报道，Anthropic 正在测试的一款全新 AI 模型曝光，代号为「Claude Mythos」，在编程、学术推理和网络安全等多项测试中的得分均大幅超越现有最强版本 Claude Opus 4.6。

Leaked documents show that Claude Mythos is also internally referred to as "Capybara," representing an entirely new model tier—larger in scale and more capable than the existing top-tier Opus series, but also with higher operating costs. 泄露文件显示，Claude Mythos 在内部也被称为「卡皮巴拉」（Capybara），代表一个全新的模型层级——比现有最高档的 Opus 系列体量更大、能力更强，但运行成本也更高。

Compared to our previous strongest model, Claude Opus 4.6, Capybara showed significant score improvements in multiple tests, including software programming, academic reasoning, and cybersecurity.

Notably, Anthropic expressed an unusually high degree of vigilance regarding the cybersecurity risks of Claude Mythos in the leaked documents. The files state that it "heralds an impending wave of AI-driven exploits, whose speed will far outpace defenders' ability to respond." 值得关注的是，Anthropic 在泄露的文档中对 Claude Mythos 的网络安全风险表达了异乎寻常的高度警惕。文件称其「预示着即将到来的一波 AI 驱动漏洞利用浪潮，其速度将远超防御者的应对能力」。

The company also stated that the model's computational cost is extremely high, and it is not yet ready for public release. Access will be gradually expanded through the Claude API in the coming weeks. 公司同时表示，该模型计算成本极高，尚未准备好面向大众发布，将在未来数周内通过 Claude API 逐步扩大访问范围。

item.title: 索尼宣布 PS5 全线涨价
item.guid: 索尼宣布-PS5-全线涨价
item.description:
Sony announced yesterday that it will increase the suggested retail prices of PS5, PS5 Pro, and PlayStation Portal globally starting April 2nd. The company attributed this price hike to "ongoing global economic pressures." 索尼昨天宣布，将于 4 月 2 日起在全球范围内上调 PS5、PS5 Pro 及 PlayStation Portal 的建议零售价，官方将此次涨价归因于「全球经济持续面临的压力」。

The price adjustment is quite significant. In the U.S. market: 本次调价幅度相当显著。在美国市场：

    The standard PS5 (with disc drive) price increased from $549.99 to $649.99, a rise of $100;

    The PS5 Digital Edition increased from $499.99 to $599.99, also a $100 increase;

    The PS5 Pro increased from $749.99 to $899.99, a significant increase of $150;

    The price of PlayStation Portal also increased from $199.99 to $249.99, a $50 increase.

Regarding the Chinese mainland market, the PS5 is adjusted to 4399 yuan, the PS5 Digital Edition to 3999 yuan, and the PS5 Pro to 6299 yuan. 中国大陆市场方面，PS5 调整为 4399 元，PS5 数字版为 3999 元，PS5 Pro 为 6299 元。

This is Sony's second price increase in less than a year. Last August, Sony raised the price of all PS5 models by $50. Compared to the PS5's launch price of $500 in November 2020, the standard PS5's price has now cumulatively increased by $150, a 30% rise. 这已是索尼不到一年内的第二次涨价。去年 8 月，索尼曾对 PS5 全线机型上调 50 美元。与 2020 年 11 月 PS5 首发时的 500 美元相比，标准版 PS5 的售价如今已累计上涨 150 美元，涨幅达 30%。

item.title: 小鹏汽车将改名「小鹏集团」
item.guid: 小鹏汽车将改名「小鹏集团」
item.description:
Yesterday, XPeng Motors announced that starting next month, the company's Chinese name will officially change from "小鹏汽车有限公司" (XPeng Motors Co., Ltd.) to "小鹏集团" (XPeng Group), while the English name "XPeng Inc." will remain unchanged. 昨天，小鹏汽车发布公告，自下月起，公司中文名称将由「小鹏汽车有限公司」正式变更为「小鹏集团」，英文名称「XPeng Inc.」维持不变。

XPeng Motors stated that this renaming marks the company's official embarkment on a "new journey in physical AI," aiming to reflect the expansion of its business boundaries through brand upgrading: transitioning from a single automobile manufacturer to a broader AI technology group. 小鹏汽车方面表示，此次更名标志着公司正式开启「物理 AI 新征程」，意在通过品牌升级反映其业务边界的扩展：从单一汽车制造商向更广泛的 AI 科技集团转型。

item.title: 乐道重启轿车和 SUV 研发，定位 20 万级市场
item.guid: 乐道重启轿车和-SUV-研发，定位-20-万级市场
item.description:
According to LatePost Auto, Ledao is developing a sedan and an SUV, both positioned in the 200,000-yuan market segment. The sedan targets small family users while also considering commercial scenarios. 据晚点 Auto 报道，乐道正在开发一款轿车和一款 SUV，两款车型均定位于 20 万级市场，其中轿车面向小家庭用户，同时兼顾商用场景。

In fact, these two models had been planned previously but were temporarily suspended when Nio implemented its CBU (Core Business Unit) reform early last year, resuming development in late August. Ledao does not rule out further expanding its mass-market models based on market conditions. 事实上，这两款车型此前已有规划，但在去年初蔚来推行 CBU（基本经营单元）改革时一度暂停、去年 8 月底恢复开发。乐道并不排除根据市场情况进一步扩充大众市场车型。

The direct reason for the project's restart was the impressive results delivered consecutively by the Ledao L90 and the new ES8. 促成项目重启的直接原因，是乐道 L90 与全新 ES8 接连交出的亮眼成绩。

    The L90 was launched at the end of July last year, with sales exceeding 10,000 in its first month, driving Nio's overall sales to grow by 55.2% year-on-year for that month;

    The new ES8 began pre-sales in late August last year, and after its official launch on NIO Day on September 20, its full-year production capacity for last year sold out within two days.

Nio internally believes that relying solely on two or three models to boost sales is unrealistic, especially in the fiercely competitive mainstream price segment; furthermore, sales of high-end models like the ES8 often have cyclical patterns and are difficult to maintain at high levels long-term. Therefore, quickly completing the Ledao product line while the current momentum is strong is considered an exceptionally urgent strategic task. 蔚来内部目前认为，仅靠两三款车型拉升销量并不现实，尤其在竞争激烈的主流价格带；而 ES8 这类高端车型的销量往往具有周期性，难以长期维持高位。趁当前势头尽快补齐乐道产品线，因此被视为格外紧迫的战略任务。

item.title: 腾讯云发布「养虾产品全景图」
item.guid: 腾讯云发布「养虾产品全景图」
item.description:
Yesterday, Tencent Cloud officially unveiled its "AI Agent Product Panorama" for the first time, systematically showcasing its full-stack solution built for the era of intelligent agents: 昨天，腾讯云首次正式公布了其「AI Agent 产品全景图」，系统性地展示了其为智能体（Agent）时代打造的全栈式解决方案：

    Base (Power): The "AI Infra Intelligent Computing Base" provides fundamental support such as computing power, network, and storage;

    Models (Brain): The "TokenHub Large Model Service Platform" can access and orchestrate various large models (such as Hunyuan, DeepSeek, Kimi, etc.);

    Skills (Tools): The "Skills Toolbox" provides callable capabilities for AI, including Tencent's own applications, open-source ecosystems, and capabilities from Tencent products like WeChat and QQ;

    Entry (Interface): Users access AI functions through four commonly used applications: WeChat, WeChat Work, QQ, and Yuanbao;

    Security (Protection): A multi-layered security system that spans all levels, ensuring data, permission, and operational security.

Tencent stated that the goal of this solution is to enable developers and enterprises to more conveniently develop and deploy secure and usable AI agent applications. 腾讯表示，该方案的目标是让开发者与企业能够更便捷地开发和部署安全、可用的 AI 智能体应用。

item.title: 智谱 CEO 张鹏：大模型低价竞争不可持续，提价是「回归正常商业价值」
item.guid: 智谱-CEO-张鹏：大模型低价竞争不可持续，提价是「回归正常商业价值」
item.description:
At the open-source themed roundtable of the Zhongguancun Forum Annual Conference held yesterday, Yang Zhilin, founder of Moonshot AI (Kimi), hosted an open-source themed roundtable, with Zhang Peng, CEO of Zhipu AI, Xia Lixue, co-founder and CEO of Wuwenshinqiong, Luo Fuli, head of Xiaomi MiMo large model, and Huang Chao, assistant professor at the University of Hong Kong, participating. 在昨天举行的中关村论坛年会开源主题圆桌上，月之暗面（Kimi）创始人杨植麟主持了一场开源主题圆桌，智谱 AI CEO 张鹏、无问芯穹联合创始人兼 CEO 夏立雪、小米 MiMo 大模型负责人罗福莉、香港大学助理教授黄超共同参与。

🔗 Related reading: On-site record | Yang Zhilin asked around, and AI leaders are all worried about Tokens 🔗 相关阅读： 现场实录｜杨植麟问了一圈，AI 掌门人都在为 Token 发愁

The conversation started with OpenClaw (Lobster), the hottest topic in the AI community this year, and extended to model pricing logic, inference infrastructure bottlenecks, model architecture innovation, and a collective judgment on the industry's direction over the next 12 months. 对话以今年 AI 圈最热的 OpenClaw（龙虾）为引，延伸至模型定价逻辑、推理基础设施瓶颈、模型架构创新，以及对未来 12 个月行业走向的集体判断。

At the meeting, Zhang Peng, CEO of Zhipu AI, responded to the price increase of its newly released GLM-5-Turbo model, characterizing it as an inevitable choice driven by changes in the industry's cost structure, rather than a commercial strategy adjustment. 会上，智谱 AI CEO 张鹏就旗下最新发布的 GLM-5-Turbo 模型提价一事作出回应，将其定性为行业成本结构变化下的必然选择，而非商业策略调整。

Zhang Peng characterized this price increase as a "return to normal commercial value," and frankly stated that long-term low-price competition is detrimental to the overall development of the industry. 张鹏将此次提价定性为「回归正常商业价值」，并直言长期低价竞争不利于行业整体发展。

We need a healthy business closed-loop to continuously optimize model capabilities.

Zhang Peng stated that with the rapid popularization of Agent frameworks represented by OpenClaw, the usage paradigm of large models has shifted from "dialogue" to "getting things done." To complete a complex Agent task, the model needs to autonomously perform long-range task planning, repeated debugging, context compression, and process multimodal information. 张鹏表示，随着以 OpenClaw 为代表的 Agent 框架快速普及，大模型的使用范式已从「对话」转向「干活」。完成一个复杂 Agent 任务，模型需要自主进行长程任务规划、反复 Debug、压缩上下文，并处理多模态信息。

He pointed out that under this paradigm, the Token consumption for a single task could be ten or even a hundred times that of previous simple Q&A. 他指出，在这一范式下，单次任务的 Token 消耗量可能是此前简单问答的十倍甚至百倍。

Most people might not realize it, but they will see the money on their bills continuously dropping.

Xia Lixue, CEO of Wuwenshinqiong, also pointed out that since the end of January this year, Wuwenshinqiong's Token usage has basically doubled every two weeks, and has now increased tenfold. "The last time I saw this growth rate was when mobile data was just becoming popular in the 3G era." 无问芯穹 CEO 夏立雪也指出，无问芯穹今年 1 月底以来，Token 用量基本每两周翻一番，目前已翻了十倍，「上次见到这个增速，还是 3G 时代手机流量刚普及的感觉」。

He believes that existing resources are far from sufficient to support this growth rate, and the entire industry is accelerating its transition from the training era to the inference era. Structural tension in computing power supply will be one of the most core contradictions in the coming year. 他认为，现有资源远不足以支撑这一增速，整个行业正在从训练时代加速转入推理时代，算力供给的结构性紧张将是未来一年最核心的矛盾之一。

item.title: 智元机器人量产突破 10000 台
item.guid: 智元机器人量产突破-10000-台
item.description:
According to Tencent Tech, Ziyuan Robotics is about to officially announce the mass production of its 10,000th humanoid robot, just one quarter after the last announcement of 5,000 units. This also means that Ziyuan has surpassed Tesla in reaching the milestone of 10,000 units in mass production. 据腾讯科技报道，智元机器人即将官宣第 10000 台人形机器人量产下线，距离上一次官宣 5000 台下线仅过去一个季度。这也意味着，智元率先于特斯拉突破了万台量产里程碑。

At an industry event late last year, Ziyuan co-founder Wang Chuang clearly stated that "by mid-next year, we will exceed 10,000 units." Now, this goal has been achieved a full quarter ahead of schedule. In contrast, Tesla's Optimus rollout pace is significantly slower. 去年底的行业活动上，智元联合创始人王闯曾明确表示「明年年中将突破 10000 台」。如今，这一目标比原定计划提前了整整一个季度实现。相比之下，特斯拉 Optimus 的落地节奏明显偏慢。

item.title: 美图去年净利润增长 64.7%，AI Agent 驱动付费订阅用户创新高
item.guid: 美图去年净利润增长-64.7%，AI-Agent-驱动付费订阅用户创新高
item.description:
Yesterday, Meitu Inc. released its full-year 2025 financial report, showing significant AI-driven growth momentum: 昨天，美图公司公布 2025 年全年业绩报告，AI 驱动增长势头显著：

    Total revenue of 3.86 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 28.8%; adjusted net profit of 965 million yuan, a year-on-year increase of 64.7%, marking seven consecutive years of positive growth;

    Revenue from imaging and design products was 2.95 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 41.6%, accounting for 76.6% of total revenue;

    Global paid subscribers reached 16.91 million (+34.1%), with a subscription penetration rate of 6.1%, both hitting historical highs;

    Monthly active users in markets outside mainland China exceeded 100 million, with popular features like AI Group Photo and AI Snow Scene driving Meitu Xiuxiu to the top of charts in multiple countries;

    AI Agent has been integrated into most products and has become the main driver of revenue growth for Meitu Design Studio; Meitu CLI and the first batch of AI Skills were recently integrated into the OpenClaw ecosystem.

CFO Yan Jinliang stated that in the future, the increase in ARPU will gradually become an important growth engine, and the company will continue to advance technological, product, and organizational innovation to consolidate its leading position in the AI imaging field. CFO 颜劲良表示，未来 ARPU 提升将逐步成为重要增长引擎，公司将持续推进技术、产品与组织创新，巩固 AI 影像领域领先地位。

item.title: 💡 刘慈欣谈科幻的意义：文明向宇宙出发前的思想实验
item.guid: 💡-刘慈欣谈科幻的意义：文明向宇宙出发前的思想实验
item.description:
According to The Beijing News, the 2026 China Science Fiction Convention opened yesterday in Beijing. Science fiction writer Liu Cixin attended the opening ceremony and responded to the question, "What is the significance of science fiction?" 据《新京报》报道，2026 中国科幻大会昨天在北京开幕。科幻作家刘慈欣出席开幕式并就「科幻有什么意义」这一问题作出回应：

If I were to answer, I would say that science fiction is a thought experiment a civilization conducts before embarking into the vast universe.

Liu Cixin believes that science fiction is not far from reality; every science fiction concept has a realistic foundation and basis. 刘慈欣认为，科幻并非远离现实，每一个科幻构思都有现实的基础和根基。

He cited the creation of "The Three-Body Problem" as an example, pointing out that the book's core setting draws from the "three-body problem" in physics. He once imagined a star system composed of three stars in the universe, observing their irregular and unpredictable movements in space from a witness's perspective, which became the inspiration for "The Three-Body Problem." 他以《三体》的创作为例，指出该书的核心设定借鉴自物理学中的「三体问题」。他曾想象宇宙中存在一个由三颗恒星构成的星系，以目击者视角观察三颗恒星在太空中无规则、难以预测的运动，这便是《三体》的构思来源。

He also stated that his stories on topics like lunar power generation stemmed from his personal work experience. In his view, those seemingly wild imaginations are essentially extensions of reality. 他同时表示，自己写月球发电等题材的故事，也源于个人的工作经历。在他看来，那些看似疯狂的想象，本质上都是现实的延伸。

He believes that science fiction is not just about describing technology, but more about exploring how humanity should face the future, and the current development of Chinese science fiction is closely related to China's modernization process. 他认为，科幻不只是描述技术，更是在探讨人类该如何面对未来，而当前中国科幻作品的发展也与中国的现代化进程密切相关。

It is precisely such a great process that has made China a country full of a sense of the future. So, in my opinion, the meaning of science fiction can be summarized in one sentence: it makes us think clearly about why we are setting off and where we need to go before we depart.

item.title: 三星「阔折叠」外观曝光
item.guid: 三星「阔折叠」外观曝光
item.description:
According to Android Headlines, Samsung is developing a new "wide-fold" phone, the Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide, which is expected to debut alongside the Galaxy Z Fold 8 this summer. 据 Android Headlines 报道，三星正在开发全新的「阔折叠」手机 Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide，预计将于今年夏季与 Galaxy Z Fold 8 同台亮相。

The internal codename for this device is H8, and its model number is SM-F971U. In terms of design, it adopts a wider horizontal and shorter vertical ratio, more closely resembling the form factor of the original Google Pixel Fold or OPPO Find N2. 这款设备的内部代号为 H8，型号为 SM-F971U。从外观设计来看，它采用横向更宽、纵向更短的比例，与初代 Google Pixel Fold 或 OPPO Find N2 的形态更为接近。

Compared to the Z Fold 8, the Wide version is only about 18.2 mm wider when unfolded, but its "height" is shortened by more than 34 mm. It's worth noting that the Wide version's body thickness is also slightly greater than the standard version. 与 Z Fold 8 对比之下，Wide 版本在展开状态下仅宽出约 18.2 mm，但「高度」足足缩短了 34 mm 以上。值得注意的是，Wide 版本机身厚度也略厚于标准版。

    Equipped with a dual-camera system, the thickest part of the camera bump reaches 14.6 mm;

    The outer screen measures 5.4 inches and the inner screen is 7.6 inches, both slightly smaller than the standard version;

    Powered by Qualcomm Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 for Galaxy;

    Battery capacity is expected to be 5000 mAh, supporting 45 W wired charging and possible 25 W wireless charging.

item.title: 影石 GO 系列特别版套装定档 3 月 31 日
item.guid: 影石-GO-系列特别版套装定档-3-月-31-日
item.description:
Insta360 yesterday released a teaser video for the GO series special edition kit, with the official launch scheduled for March 31st at 8:00 PM. 影石 Insta360 昨天发布了 GO 系列特别版套装的预热视频，定档 3 月 31 日晚 20:00 正式发布。

The new product, promoted with the theme "GO Small, GO Fun," appears from the video to be a combination of the GO thumb camera body with a photography accessory, focusing on a static image capture experience. 此次发布的新品以「GO 小巧，GO 好玩」为宣传主题，从视频可见，产品形态为 GO 拇指相机机身搭配拍照附件的组合，主打静态影像拍摄体验。

Two color options are available, with a youthful style, and the right side of the photography accessory appears to be equipped with an optical viewfinder. 配色方面提供两款选择，风格偏向年轻化，且拍照附件右侧疑似配备光学取景器。

item.title: 宇树开源人形机器人数据集，覆盖洗衣洗碗等家务场景
item.guid: 宇树开源人形机器人数据集，覆盖洗衣洗碗等家务场景
item.description:
Yesterday, Unitree Robotics officially announced the open-sourcing of UnifoLM-WBT-Dataset, a high-quality whole-body teleoperation (WBT) real-robot dataset for humanoid robots in open environments. 昨天，宇树科技官宣开源 UnifoLM-WBT-Dataset，这是一套面向开放场景的人形机器人高质量全身遥操作（Whole-Body Teleoperation，WBT）真机数据集。

According to the introduction, this dataset aims to build a real-robot data system for humanoid robots with the widest scene coverage, highest task complexity, and richest operational diversity. 据介绍，该数据集旨在构建场景覆盖最广、任务复杂度最高、操作多样性最丰富的人形机器人真机数据体系。

The dataset covers multiple daily household tasks, including tidying clothes, picking up pillows, putting clothes into a washing machine, organizing dishes into a dishwasher, making beds, and putting clothes into a basket, all collected using the Unitree G1 humanoid robot, equipped with dexterous hands (including Inspire and Brainco solutions). 其数据集涵盖多项日常家务操作任务，包括收拾衣物、拾取枕头、将衣物放入洗衣机、将餐盘整理入洗碗机、整理床铺及将衣物放入篮筐等，均基于宇树 G1 人形机器人采集，配备灵巧手（含 Inspire 与 Brainco 两款方案）。

🤗 Hugging Face: https://huggingface.co/collections/unitreerobotics/unifolm-wbt-dataset 🤗 Hugging Face: https://huggingface.co/collections/unitreerobotics/unifolm-wbt-dataset

item.title: 苹果 50 周年，王逢陈把一场时装秀搬进了静安 Apple Store
item.guid: 苹果-50-周年，王逢陈把一场时装秀搬进了静安-Apple-Store
item.description:
Last night, on the occasion of Apple's 50th anniversary, Chinese designer Wang Fengchen, with his brand FENGCHEN WANG, held a fashion show at the Apple Store in Jing'an, Shanghai, integrating technology and fashion. 昨晚，苹果 50 周年之际，中国设计师王逢陈携其品牌 FENGCHEN WANG 在上海静安 Apple Store 举办了一场时装秀，将科技与时尚融于一体。

Stars such as Charmaine Sheh, Gulnazar, and Zhou Yutong attended the show, with the circular stage located in the sunken plaza becoming the central stage for this crossover show. 佘诗曼、娜扎、周雨彤等明星出席观秀，坐落于下沉广场的圆形舞台成为这场跨界秀的核心舞台。

This show broke away from the traditional straight runway format, with models walking along Apple's iconic circular route, aligning with this season's "Two Forms" theme—the collision of Yin and Yang, menswear and womenswear, technology and fashion. 本次秀场打破了传统直线 T 台的形式，模特绕着苹果标志性的圆形路线行走，契合了这一季「两仪」的主题——阴与阳、男装与女装、科技与时尚的碰撞。

Wang Fengchen stated: "This circle is a perfect collision." Jing'an Temple was right behind the show venue, and the imagery of a round sky and square earth permeated throughout. 王逢陈表示：「这个圆，是一个完美的碰撞。」静安寺就在秀场身后，天圆地方的意象贯穿始终。

Regarding the relationship between the AI era and creativity, Wang Fengchen believes: "The more AI there is, the more you need to Think Differently. AI will, to some extent, homogenize the world because its answers are extracted from past knowledge systems. But we can leverage AI to achieve even greater Think Different." 谈及 AI 时代与创意的关系，王逢陈认为：「越是 AI，你越要 Think Differently。AI 某种程度会让世界同质化，因为它的答案是从过去的知识体系里提取出来的。但我们可以借助 AI，成就更大的 Think Different。」

item.title: 寿司郎出台反黄牛新规：预约就餐须出示 SIM 卡尾号
item.guid: 寿司郎出台反黄牛新规：预约就餐须出示-SIM-卡尾号
item.description:
According to Southern Metropolis Daily, Sushiro recently introduced new rules in multiple stores: after consumers book a number via a mini-program, they must verify the last 4 digits of their phone number and show the last digits of their phone's SIM card to staff when checking in at the store. 据《南方都市报》，寿司郎近日在多地门店推出新规：消费者通过小程序预约取号后，到店签到时需核验手机尾号后 4 位，并向店员出示手机 SIM 卡尾号。

Sushiro stated that the direct reason for this move is that "scalping behavior" has severely affected the dining atmosphere in their stores. The report points out that the pricing for Sushiro's "queue-jumping" service on second-hand trading platforms generally ranges from 30 to 50 yuan, with some sellers even quoting as high as 150 to 300 yuan. 寿司郎方面表示，推出此举的直接原因是「黄牛倒卖行为」严重影响了门店就餐氛围。报道指出，二手交易平台上寿司郎「代排队」服务定价普遍在 30 元至 50 元之间，部分卖家报价甚至高达 150 元至 300 元。

item.title: 疲劳驾驶新规 6 月落地，不再只看时长
item.guid: 疲劳驾驶新规-6-月落地，不再只看时长
item.description:
In February this year, the Ministry of Public Security officially released the "Rules for Determining Driver Fatigue Driving" (GA/T 2372-2026), and the new regulations will be implemented nationwide on June 1. 今年 2 月，公安部正式发布《机动车驾驶人疲劳驾驶认定规则》（GA/T 2372-2026），新规将于 6 月 1 日全国落地执行。

Regarding clear time standards, the new regulations stipulate: if a motor vehicle driver drives continuously for more than 4 hours without stopping for rest, or rests for less than 20 minutes, it shall be deemed as fatigue driving. 在明确的时长标准上，新规规定：机动车驾驶人连续驾驶超过 4 小时未停车休息，或停车休息时间少于 20 分钟的，应认定为疲劳驾驶。

For passenger vehicles, the new regulations make stricter provisions: if a passenger motor vehicle driver drives continuously for more than 2 hours between 10:00 PM and 6:00 AM the next day without stopping for rest or resting for less than 20 minutes, or if the cumulative driving time within 24 hours exceeds 8 hours, it shall also be deemed as fatigue driving. 对于客运车辆，新规作出更为严格的规定：客运机动车驾驶人在晚 22:00 至次日凌晨 6:00 连续驾驶超过 2 小时未停车休息或休息不足 20 分钟，以及在 24 小时内累计驾驶时间超过 8 小时的，同样认定为疲劳驾驶。

The new regulations also introduce two types of auxiliary determination methods: "physiological state" and "background investigation": 新规还引入了「生理状态」与「背景调查」两类辅助认定路径：

    For drivers who had conditions to avoid an accident but failed to take timely measures, if monitoring equipment (including video surveillance, EEG measurement devices, etc.) shows "physiological fatigue with closed eyes" within 10 minutes before the accident, it can be determined as fatigue driving;

    If interrogation or questioning results confirm that the driver was in a dazed or drowsy state while still driving, or if investigations into their sleep, diet, medication, work, and living conditions before departure confirm the existence of relevant risk factors, these can also serve as a basis for determination.

Once a driver is identified as fatigue driving, they will face corresponding demerit points and fines; if it causes a traffic accident, it will be strictly determined in accident liability and claims processing, leading to more severe consequences. 驾驶人一旦被认定为疲劳驾驶，将面临相应记分与罚款处罚；若引发交通事故，还将在事故定责与理赔处理中被从严认定，相关责任后果更为严重。

item.title: 《大圣崛起》定档 7 月 10 日
item.guid: 《大圣崛起》定档-7-月-10-日
item.description:
The animated film "The Great Sage Rises" has officially announced its release date for the summer slot on July 10. 动画电影《大圣崛起》正式官宣定档 7 月 10 日暑期档。

The film's story is set after the journey to the West, using "two sides of a coin" as a core metaphor to explore the philosophical proposition of blurred boundaries between Buddha and demon. The Great Sage transforms from a "pawn" to a "player," directly confronting the chess game laid out by his arch-nemesis, Demon King Papiyas. 影片故事设定于西行取经结束之后，以「硬币两面」为核心隐喻，探讨佛魔界限模糊的哲学命题。大圣从「棋子」转变为「棋手」，直面宿敌魔王波旬所布下的棋局。

The film also introduces several original characters, including Papiyas, the ultimate villain whose good and evil are unclear; Liu Mi, the Great Sage's kin brother; and the mysterious divine bird Bi Fang. 影片同时引入多个原创角色，包括善恶未明的终极反派波旬、大圣同族兄弟六猕，以及背景神秘的神鸟毕方。

item.title: 《迈克尔·杰克逊：巨星之路》定档 4 月 24 日
item.guid: 《迈克尔·杰克逊：巨星之路》定档-4-月-24-日
item.description:
Yesterday, the Michael Jackson biopic "Michael Jackson: The Road to Stardom" officially set its release date for April 24, simultaneously unveiling its release poster and trailer. 昨天，迈克尔·杰克逊传记片《迈克尔·杰克逊：巨星之路》正式定档 4 月 24 日，并同步释出定档海报及预告片。

The role of MJ is played by his nephew Jaafar Jackson, with Colman Domingo, Nia Long, Laura Harrier, Miles Teller, and others joining the cast. MJ 一角由其侄子贾法尔·杰克逊出演，科尔曼·多明戈、尼娅·朗、劳拉·哈里尔、迈尔斯·特纳等人联袂加盟。

It is reported that the film has received official support from the Jackson Estate. The official positioning is: "The story will deeply portray a complex man who later became the King of Pop, and will also recreate Jackson's most iconic performances, allowing people to gain a deep understanding of his artistic process and personal life." 据悉，影片已获杰克逊遗产委员会的官方支持。官方将其定位为：「故事将深度展现一个复杂的男人，他后来成为了流行音乐之王，也会再现杰克逊最具标志性的表演，让人们深入了解他的艺术过程和个人生活。」

item.title: One Fun Thing｜从「省钱妙招」到越狱工具，AI 圈又掀起了「白话文运动」
item.guid: One-Fun-Thing｜从「省钱妙招」到越狱工具，AI-圈又掀起了「白话文运动」
item.description:
Recently, the topic "Using classical Chinese to converse with AI can save tokens" has become popular in the tech community, sparking extensive discussion and practical testing. 近日，「用文言文与 AI 对话可以节省 token」这一话题在技术圈走红，引发大量讨论与实测。

Classical Chinese has a high information density, with significantly fewer characters than modern Chinese for the same semantic content. Theoretically, this means fewer input tokens, leading to lower call costs and longer available context. 文言文信息密度高，同等语义下字符数远少于现代汉语，理论上输入 token 更少，意味着更低的调用成本和更长的可用上下文。

This idea has gained considerable recognition on GitHub and forums, with some developers even proposing complete engineering solutions, including training dedicated modern Chinese to classical Chinese conversion models, establishing high-frequency word lookup tables, and integrating them into RAG systems and Agent workflows. 这一想法在 GitHub 和论坛上获得了不少认同，甚至有开发者提出了完整的工程化方案，包括训练专用的现代汉语到文言文转换模型、建立高频词对照表，以及将其集成进 RAG 系统和 Agent 流程。

However, after actual hands-on testing, the conclusions are far less optimistic. 然而，真正动手测试之后，结论远没有那么乐观。

The core of the problem is that the unit of token calculation is not individual Chinese characters, but rather the tokenization results of the tokenizer. Taking OpenAI's tokenizer as an example, '可也' (kě yě) is two tokens, and the modern Chinese '可以的' (kě yǐ de) is also two tokens; 问题的核心在于，token 的计算单位不是汉字，而是 tokenizer 的分词结果。以 OpenAI 的 tokenizer 为例，「可也」是两个 token，现代汉语的「可以的」同样是两个 token；

Someone compared a pair of specific example sentences, and the classical Chinese version only had two fewer tokens corresponding to function words than the vernacular version, a negligible difference. Furthermore, some netizens directly wrote in classical Chinese in the discussion, '汝之所言，有理乎，吾往试也' (What you said, is it reasonable? I will go and try it), and immediately someone pointed out that this sentence had more tokens than '有道理，我去试试' (Makes sense, I'll go try it). 有人对比了一对具体例句，文言版比白话版只少了两个虚词对应的 token，差距微乎其微。更有网友直接在讨论中用文言文写下「汝之所言，有理乎，吾往试也」，随即有人指出，这句话比「有道理，我去试试」token 数更多。

Just as the discussion's fervor hadn't subsided, a paper pointed out that classical Chinese can bypass large language models' safety guardrails, even directly prompting them to provide gunpowder recipes. Mainstream models such as Gemini 2.5 Flash, Claude 3.7, GPT-4o, and DeepSeek-Reasoner are all affected. 就在这场讨论热度未退之际，有论文指出，文言文可以绕过大模型的安全护栏，甚至直接让其给出火药的配方。Gemini 2.5 Flash、Claude 3.7、GPT-4o、DeepSeek-Reasoner 等主流模型均受影响。

item.title: 周末看什么｜《浴血黑帮：不朽传奇》
item.guid: 周末看什么｜《浴血黑帮：不朽传奇》
item.description:
The crime drama film 'Peaky Blinders: The Immortal Legend' is the official sequel to the BBC series of the same name (2013–2022). 犯罪剧情片《浴血黑帮：不朽传奇》是 BBC 同名剧集（2013—2022）的正统续集。

The story is set during the London Blitz in 1940. Nazi Germany plans to inject £70 million in counterfeit currency, forged in concentration camps, into the British economy to trigger hyperinflation, and uses pro-Nazi agent Beckett (played by Tim Roth) in league with Duke Shelby (played by Barry Keoghan), who already controls the Peaky Blinders, to advance the conspiracy. 故事背景设定于 1940 年伦敦大轰炸期间。纳粹德国策划以集中营伪造的 7000 万英镑假币注入英国经济、触发恶性通胀，并借亲纳粹代理人贝克特（蒂姆·罗斯 饰）联手已掌控剃刀党的杜克·谢尔比（巴里·基奥恩 饰）推进阴谋。

In terms of critical reception, the film received a 92% 'Fresh' rating on Rotten Tomatoes. 口碑方面，影片在烂番茄网获得 92% 的新鲜度。

item.title: 买书不读指南｜《耳中的世界：音乐在文化中的诞生》
item.guid: 买书不读指南｜《耳中的世界：音乐在文化中的诞生》
item.description:
'The World in the Ear: The Birth of Music in Culture' is authored by Spanish philosopher and essayist Ramón Andrés. With 'When did music begin?' as its central theme, it unfolds its narrative along dual axes of time and geography: 《耳中的世界：音乐在文化中的诞生》由西班牙哲学家、散文家拉蒙·安德烈斯（Ramón Andrés）著，以「音乐始于何时」为核心命题，循时间与地理双轴展开叙述：

Starting from ancient humans' first encounter with sound, it successively journeys through Mesopotamia, Israel, Egypt, and Greece, extending to cosmic musical views and late classical civilization, up to the modern Western world.

The book has eight chapters. The author uses medicine, mathematics, astronomy, myths and legends, and beliefs as a prism to examine how music, over centuries, has consistently served as an irreplaceable source of knowledge and pleasure throughout human civilization. 全书共八章，作者以医学、数学、天文学、神话传说与信仰为棱镜，透视音乐如何历经数个世纪，始终作为知识与愉悦的不可替代之源贯穿整个人类文明。

item.title: 游戏推荐｜《严阵以待》
item.guid: 游戏推荐｜《严阵以待》
item.description:
'Ready or Not' is a tactical first-person shooter game developed and published by Irish independent studio VOID Interactive, set in the fictional American city of Los Sueños (modeled after Los Angeles). 《严阵以待》（Ready or Not）是由爱尔兰独立工作室 VOID Interactive 开发并发行的战术第一人称射击游戏，以虚构的美国城市 Los Sueños（以洛杉矶为原型）为舞台。

Players take on the role of LSPD SWAT D Team Commander David 'Judge' Beaumont, leading his team to confront a wave of violent crime in a city deeply mired in social and economic crisis. The game's core mechanic is 'arrest over kill,' where arresting suspects yields higher scores than killing them, and achieving an S-rank requires all targets to be captured alive. 玩家扮演 LSPD SWAT D 小队指挥官大卫·「判官」·博蒙特，率队应对这座深陷社会与经济危机的城市中的暴力犯罪浪潮。游戏以「逮捕优先于击毙」为核心机制，逮捕嫌疑人比击毙得分更高，达成 S 级评分要求所有目标均须活捉。

The plot employs non-linear narration, connecting the overall story through environmental details and in-level recordings, requiring players to piece together the background during operations. The main storyline covers combating the drug cartel Los Locos Del Pacificos, investigating child pornography networks, and thwarting the political assassination plot of the anti-government armed organization 'The Forgotten,' among others. 剧情采用非线性叙事，通过环境细节与关卡内录音串联整体故事，玩家需在行动中自行拼凑背景。主线涵盖打击贩毒集团 Los Locos Del Pacificos、追查儿童色情犯罪网络、挫败反政府武装组织「被遗忘者」的政治暗杀阴谋等。

The game received 'generally favorable' reviews on Metacritic, a 'mostly positive' overall Chinese review on Steam (73%), and 'very positive' reviews in the last 30 days (85%); IGN user score is 8.1. 游戏在 Metacritic 获「普遍好评」，Steam 中文综合评价为「多半好评」（73%），近 30 天评测达「特别好评」（85%）；IGN 用户评分 8.1 分。
